meaning: vt.解开,解放,解决vi.松开,解开
examples: His clumsy fingers couldn't untie the knot.
The old man smiled and ordered his servant to untie the bundle of sticks.
Untie my leg and I can tell it to you better.
If he wanted to, he could untie the boat and sail out into the bay.
Fully engaged, the Brembos arrest the speeding truck as if you'd forgotten to untie it from the dock.
